competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Manu Koné (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Désiré Doué.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.
Attempt saved. Dayot Upamecano (France) header from very close range is saved in the centre of the goal by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé with a cross.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺射正。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Désiré Doué (France).
Attempt blocked. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射门被封堵。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Lucas Digne (France).
Attempt missed. Ousmane Dembélé (France) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Désiré Doué with a cross.

events.description: 登贝莱射门偏出。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Manu Koné.

events.description: 登贝莱射门被封堵。 马努·科内参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Noussair Mazraoui.
Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Lucas Digne.
Penalty France. Kylian Mbappé draws a foul in the penalty area.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 登贝莱射门偏出。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Corner, France. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.
Attempt blocked. Jules Koundé (France) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Michael Olise with a cross.

events.description: 朱尔斯·昆德射门被封堵。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Manu Koné (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by William Saliba (France).
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Adrien Rabiot (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Manu Koné (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by William Saliba.

events.description: 马努·科内射门被封堵。 威廉·萨利巴参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Attempt blocked. Brahim Díaz (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Azzedine Ounahi.

events.description: 布拉欣·迪亚斯射门被封堵。 阿泽丁·欧纳济参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Désiré Doué (France).
Attempt missed. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right from a direct free kick.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Michael Olise.
Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射正。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high.
Goal! France 1, Morocco 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Désiré Doué.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.

events.description: 苏菲安·拉希米替补登场，换下比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Morocco. Sofyan Amrabat replaces Ayyoub Bouaddi.

events.description: 索夫扬·阿姆拉巴特替补登场，换下阿尤布·布阿迪。

qualifiers.espnText: Kylian Mbappé (France) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Issa Diop (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! France 2, Morocco 0. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, France. Warren Zaïre-Emery replaces Manu Koné.

events.description: 沃伦·扎伊尔·埃默里替补登场，换下马努·科内。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Dayot Upamecano.
Substitution, Morocco. Zakaria El Ouahdi replaces Anass Salah-Eddine.

events.description: 扎卡里亚·瓦赫迪替补登场，换下萨拉赫-埃丁。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Morocco. Gessime Yassine replaces Brahim Díaz.

events.description: 盖西姆·亚辛替补登场，换下布拉欣·迪亚斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Désiré Doué (France) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Delay in match because of an injury Kylian Mbappé (France).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, France. Jean-Philippe Mateta replaces Kylian Mbappé because of an injury.

events.description: 让·菲利普·马塔塔替补登场，换下姆巴佩。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Désiré Doué.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉替补登场，换下德西尔·杜埃。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Warren Zaïre-Emery (France).

events.description: 沃伦·扎伊尔·埃默里犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Issa Diop.
Foul by Jules Koundé (France).
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

events.description: 阿泽丁·欧纳济射正。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Michael Olise.
Attempt missed. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) header from the left side of the six yard box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross following a corner.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Neil El Aynaoui Shot Off Target

events.description: 尼尔·艾纳维射门偏出。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Morocco. Amine Sbaï replaces Chemsdine Talbi.

events.description: 阿明·斯拜替补登场，换下凯姆斯丁·塔尔比。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Bradley Barcola following a fast break.

events.description: 奥利塞射门偏出。 布拉德利·巴克拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Malo Gusto replaces Jules Koundé.

events.description: 马洛·古斯托替补登场，换下朱尔斯·昆德。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Corner, France. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.
Attempt missed. Jean-Philippe Mateta (France) header from very close range is too high. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 让·菲利普·马塔塔射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Achraf Hakimi (Morocco).
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Lucas Digne.
Foul by Zakaria El Ouahdi (Morocco).
Attempt saved. Jean-Philippe Mateta (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 让·菲利普·马塔塔射正。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Gessime Yassine (Morocco) left footed shot from more than 40 yards on the right wing is too high. Assisted by Sofyan Amrabat.

events.description: 盖西姆·亚辛射门偏出。 索夫扬·阿姆拉巴特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Amine Sbaï (Morocco).
Attempt missed. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 奥利塞射门偏出。 布拉德利·巴克拉参与进攻。

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
